description:
Need some weekend or daytrip inspiration in or around Tokyo that ISN'T the usual places? Look no further! Thank you @TokyoTokyoOldmeetsNew  for taking me on a whirlwind of a week long trip, discovering all of these amazing and unique places. 

Chapters
00:00 - Intro
00:17 - Togakushi Shrine hike
01:22 - Zenkoji and the surrounding area
01:55 - Make your own shichimi
02:14 - Traditional Monks Cuisine
02:15 - A bar run by monks
03:48 - Archery on horseback experience
05:00 - Kobuchizawa by e-bike
05:28 - Bonus round! 3 extra spots!
06:24 - Sorano Hotel
07:04 - Cinema with "explosive sound"
07:42 - Hike with a view of Mt Fuji
09:30 - Underrated area of Tokyo
10:03 - Boardgame cafe
10:21 - The wildest restaurant you'll ever see
11:21 - Jindaiji Temple
12:01 - Jindai Botanical Gardens
12:53 - Luxury Sauna in the forest
14:11 - Outro

Yabusame Horse Riding: https://yatsugatake.canadiancamp.jp/plan/%e3%80%90%e6%b5%81%e9%8f%91%e9%a6%ac%e4%bd%93%e9%a8%93%e3%83%97%e3%83%a9%e3%83%b3%e3%80%91/
Cinema City: https://cinemacity.co.jp/ 
SORANO HOTEL: https://soranohotel.com/en/ 
Satologue: https://satologue.com/ 

•

Visiting Japan and want to experience something different? You'll love my travel guide - Beyond The Tourist Trail. A comprehensive e-book for travellers filled with 120+ hidden gems in Japan between Tokyo and Osaka. Available now on my website: https://geni.us/beyondthetouristtrail 

Grab some merch:
https://geni.us/channel-merch

Support me on Patreon for extra content and early access: 
www.patreon.com/currentlyhannah 

Instagram:
@currently.hannah

Music from Musicbed:
https://geni.us/musicbedref

My filming gear:
https://kit.co/currentlyhannah

#currentlyhannah #japantravel #tokyotravel
